_meta.description: Barro Kitchens Product Database — compiled from BARRO-KITCHENS_PRICE-LIST_2025-2026.xlsx and cross-referenced against 30+ client quotations in Quotations Archive

formulaTypes.per_length: Base price + ((W_mm - baseLengthMm) / 100) * formula.rateW100 + ((D_mm - baseD_mm) / 100) * formula.rateD100
formulaTypes.per_run: Price per run/section multiplied by quantity

_meta.laborNotes: laborHours: fabrication = shop hours, installation = site hours. Timeline = max(totalFabHours, totalInstHours) / teamSize / 8hrs
_meta.pricingNote: Rate/100mm: for every 100mm added beyond base dimension, add rate. Use rateW100 for width, rateD100 for depth, rateH100 for height.
